creator: tomek@cedro.info
text:
Hello world :-)

I am experiencing issues with Intel HDA Audio. Working on 12.0-RELEASE + X11 + Enlightenment + PulseAudio. Sometimes card is not visible for PulseAudio on devices list, then is whows up after some time or reboot.

I constantly get this message on DMESG:
hdac0: Command timeout on address 0.


Machine details:

FreeBSD 0xCFMX4 12.0-RELEASE-p10 FreeBSD 12.0-RELEASE-p10 GENERIC  amd64

root@0xCFMX4:~ # pciconf -l
